targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_percent")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 1048576.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rx_bytes")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tx_bytes")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_response")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "response_time")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_response")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "http_response_code")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_active")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.cpu == "cpu-total")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "used_percent")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "disk")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "used_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.path == "/")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "load1")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "http_requests_total")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "rps")

sum_rate = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "http_request_duration_seconds_sum")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

count_rate = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "http_request_duration_seconds_count")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

join(tables: {sum: sum_rate, count: count_rate}, on: ["_time", "handler", "method"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value_count > 0.0 then r._value_sum / r._value_count else 0.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "handler", "method"])
  |> yield(name: "avg_latency")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "http_requests_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.status == "5xx")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "5xx")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "http_requests_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.status == "4xx")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "4xx")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "http_requests_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.status == "2xx")
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["handler", "method"])
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "total")
